title: taraxacum jugiferum
intro: Taraxacum jugiferum, also known as the tibetan dandelion or wild lettuce, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its edible leaves and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum jugiferum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. It is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits and medicinal properties.
